results.title: AgreeGuard Review | AI Plaza
results.content:
AgreeGuard is a marketing automation tool that uses artificial intelligence to analyze and manage contractual agreements. Its core function is to assist users in reviewing, monitoring, and ensuring compliance with the terms of their business contracts. The system can process legal documents to identify key clauses, obligations, and potential risks, providing a structured overview of contractual commitments. [...] Loading tool details...

results.title: AgreeGuard: AI reads the fine print before you click "I Agree" | Product Hunt
results.content:
Aethorn
AgreeGuard

AgreeGuard

@mateuszjacni

It catches both! Forced arbitration, class-action waivers, binding jurisdiction clauses — those are actually some of the most common red flags it highlights.

Beyond the obvious ones like data selling and auto-renewals, it also flags things like unilateral terms changes, liability limitations, content licensing (where they take rights to your content), and account termination without notice. Thanks for the congrats — really appreciate it! [...] So you can absolutely audit services you're already paying for. Actually, that's one of the more eye-opening use cases - people run it on apps they've used for years and are surprised by what they agreed to without knowing.

Christian David Bazan
Aethorn
AgreeGuard

AgreeGuard

@krisba95 Appreciate it.

Takahashi

How accurate is the AI analysis? Legal language is notoriously nuanced, and a missed clause could give users a false sense of security.

Aethorn
AgreeGuard

AgreeGuard

@larkloss  Great question, Takahashi — and you're absolutely right that this matters. [...] Christian David Bazan
Aethorn
AgreeGuard

AgreeGuard

@krisba95 Thanks Christian! You nailed exactly why we built it that way — nobody wants to read a 4,000-word summary. They want to know "what should I actually worry about?"

Great question on retroactive use — yes, it works! Just visit any sign in/signup page page (like claude.ai or x.com) and AgreeGuard will analyze it on the spot. It will work if you are about to sign in or sign up - both. Because it detects the auth buttons and guards it - so when you click on them - boom AgreeGuard initialize its analysis. results.title: Privacy Policy — AgreeGuard | AgreeGuard
results.content:
Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
 Correction: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
 Deletion: Request deletion of your account and all associated data, including analysis history, decisions, and profile information.
 Objection: Object to processing of your data for specific purposes.
 Portability: Request your data in a portable format.

To exercise any of these rights, email us atsupport@agreeguard.app with your account email address. We will respond within 30 days.

To clear locally stored data (cache, preferences, session), you can uninstall the AgreeGuard extension or clear extension data from your browser settings.

## 8. Cookies

We use essential cookies and limited analytics cookies. Browser settings may be used to control cookies. [...] ### 2.2 Information Collected Automatically

 Usage data (pages analyzed, features used)
 Device information (browser type, operating system)
 Log data (IP address, access times, referring URLs)
 Bug report metadata: If you submit an issue report through the extension, your browser user-agent string and extension version are included to help us diagnose the problem

### 2.3 Chrome Extension Data

The AgreeGuard Chrome extension collects and processes the following data when you use it: [...] User Decisions: When you click "I Agree" or "I Don't Agree" after reviewing an analysis, your decision is recorded along with the service name, page URL, risk level, and timestamp. This powers your personal analysis history and dashboard statistics.

results.title: Refund Policy — AgreeGuard | AgreeGuard
results.content:
← Back to Home

# Refund Policy

Last updated: December 29, 2025

This Refund Policy applies to all purchases of AgreeGuard Pro, operated byAethorn Labs Ltd.. All payments and refunds are processed by Paddle, our authorized Merchant of Record.

## 1. 30-Day Refund Window

We offer a 30-day refund period. You may request a refund for any purchase of AgreeGuard Pro within 30 calendar days from the original purchase date.

Refunds requested within this period will be processed in accordance with Paddle’s Buyer Terms and applicable consumer protection laws.

## 2. How to Request a Refund

To request a refund within the 30-day window:

 Email us atsupport@agreeguard.app
 Include the email address used for your purchase
 Include your Paddle order number or transaction ID

## 3. Refund Processing [...] ## 3. Refund Processing

All refunds are issued and processed by Paddle, our Merchant of Record. Paddle may review refund requests to prevent fraud or abuse and will handle refunds in accordance with their official policies.

You can review Paddle’s Buyer Terms here:Paddle Invoiced Consumer Terms.

## 4. Subscription Cancellation

You may cancel your subscription at any time:

 Cancel from your account settings
 Access will remain active until the end of the current billing period
 No further charges will be made after cancellation

## 5. Contact Us

If you have billing or refund-related questions, please contact us:

Email: support@agreeguard.app

## 6. Changes to This Policy [...] ## 6. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Refund Policy from time to time. Any changes will be effective immediately upon posting on this page.
